summary: Iteration 60: Phase 6 Check-In Setup Module Testing Complete. Backend: 19/19 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All Phase 6 features verified working - 6 tabs (Locations, Stations, Labels, Medical Alerts, Guardians, Reports), CRUD operations for locations/stations/labels, medical info editing, guardian management, and reports with trends/room breakdown/first-timers.

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts render with -1 dimensions initially (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning, doesn't affect functionality)
HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - caused by React dynamic rendering wrapper (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)

locations.GET /api/admin/checkin/locations: PASS - Returns 8 seeded locations with folders (Early Childhood, Preschool, Elementary, Youth, Specialized)
locations.POST /api/admin/checkin/locations: PASS - Creates new location with name, room, age_range, capacity, folder

stations.GET /api/admin/checkin/stations: PASS - Returns 2 seeded stations (Main Lobby Kiosk - self, Front Desk - manned)
stations.POST /api/admin/checkin/stations: PASS - Creates station with mode field (self/manned/roster/quick)

labels.GET /api/admin/checkin/labels: PASS - Returns 3 seeded templates (Standard Name Tag, Security Label, Allergy Alert Tag)
labels.POST /api/admin/checkin/labels: PASS - Creates label template with fields and layout options

guardians.POST /api/admin/checkin/children/{childI: PASS - Adds guardian with name, relationship, phone, pin_code

reports.GET /api/admin/checkin/reports/trends: PASS - Returns daily_trend, by_room breakdown, total_checkins

checkin_setup_page.page_loads: PASS - /checkin-setup page loads with title and description
checkin_setup_page.six_tabs: PASS - All 6 tabs present (Locations, Stations, Labels, Medical Alerts, Guardians, Reports)

locations_tab.locations_display: PASS - Shows 8 locations grouped by folder with name, room, age, capacity
locations_tab.add_location_button: PASS - Add Location button opens dialog
locations_tab.location_dialog: PASS - Dialog has name, room, age_range, capacity, folder fields

stations_tab.stations_display: PASS - Shows 2 stations with mode badges
stations_tab.mode_reference_card: PASS - Station Modes Reference card shows all 4 modes
stations_tab.add_station_dialog: PASS - Dialog has 4 mode options (self, manned, roster, quick)

labels_tab.labels_display: PASS - Shows 3 label templates with visual previews
labels_tab.printer_note: PASS - Printer driver integration note displayed

medical_alerts_tab.medical_table: PASS - Table shows children with allergies and severity
medical_alerts_tab.table_columns: PASS - Has Child, Allergies, Medical Notes, Severity, Actions columns

guardians_tab.guardian_cards: PASS - Shows 8 children cards to manage guardians

reports_tab.stat_cards: PASS - Shows Total Check-ins (11), Active Rooms (3), First-Time Visitors (6)
reports_tab.daily_trend_chart: PASS - Daily Check-in Trend chart displayed
reports_tab.room_breakdown: PASS - Check-ins by Room breakdown displayed
reports_tab.first_timers_list: PASS - First-Time Visitors list with names and dates

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 6 endpoints properly implement tenant isolation via tenant_id
Seeding logic correctly creates default locations (8), stations (2), and labels (3) on first access
Medical severity levels (low, medium, high) properly implemented
Guardian verification uses PIN codes as specified
Reports correctly aggregate check-in data by date and room
Label preview in frontend is CSS-based visual representation (printer integration is MOCKED)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with 'TEST_' prefix for locations, stations, labels, guardians (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified Phase 6 Check-In Setup Module: 6 tabs (Locations, Stations, Labels, Medical Alerts, Guardians, Reports). Locations tab shows 8 seeded locations grouped by folder. Stations tab shows 2 seeded stations with 4 mode options. Labels tab shows 3 seeded templates with visual previews. Medical Alerts tab shows children with allergies/severity. Guardians tab allows managing authorized guardians with PIN codes. Reports tab shows check-in trends, room breakdown, and first-time visitors. All backend endpoints working (19/19 tests). All frontend UI elements present and functional. Note: Welcome modal appears on first login - dismiss by clicking 'I'll figure it out myself' link. MOCKED: SolomonPay payment processing, Printer driver integration (Brother/Dymo/Zebra/Citizen).

mocked_apis_list: SolomonPay payment processing - all payment_status is 'pending'
Printer driver integration (Brother/Dymo/Zebra/Citizen) - flagged for $300 consultant (6 hours)

Locations tab shows 8 locations grouped by folder
Add Location dialog opens with all form fields
Stations tab shows 2 stations with mode badges
Station Modes Reference card displays all 4 modes
Add Station dialog has 4 mode options (self, manned, roster, quick)
Labels tab shows 3 label templates with visual previews
Medical Alerts tab shows table with children and severity
Reports tab shows Total Check-ins, Active Rooms, First-Time Visitors stats
